speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Can it be possible that no man saw them?

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: It cannot be. Some villains of my court

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Are of consent and sufferance in this.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              LORD
text: I cannot hear of any that did see her.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              LORD
text: The ladies her attendants of her chamber

speaker:
FIRST
               
              LORD
text: Saw her abed, and in the morning early

speaker:
FIRST
               
              LORD
text: They found the bed untreasured of their mistress.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: My lord, the roinish clown at whom so oft

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: Your Grace was wont to laugh is also missing.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: Hisperia, the Princess’ gentlewoman,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: Confesses that she secretly o’erheard

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: Your daughter and her cousin much commend

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: The parts and graces of the wrestler

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: That did but lately foil the sinewy Charles,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: And she believes wherever they are gone

speaker:
SECOND
               
              LORD
text: That youth is surely in their company.

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Send to his brother. Fetch that gallant hither.

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: If he be absent, bring his brother to me.

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: I’ll make him find him. Do this suddenly,

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: And let not search and inquisition quail

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: To bring again these foolish runaways.
